Aegis.Description: Invoke a radiant barrier of faith, blocking all incoming attacks for a short time, for you and nearby allies.

AerialShot.Description: Leap through the air while firing downward, striking enemies below before landing in an evasive stance.

Agility.Description: Heightens awareness and reaction speed, increasing AGI and DEX.

ArcaneSigil.Description: Pushes your casting beyond safe limits, greatly increasing magic damage and cast speed at the cost of doubled mana consumption.

ArrowShower.Description: Fires a flurry of arrows high into the air, raining down over a wide area. Enemies caught within suffer repeated strikes, forcing them to scatter.

AxeArc.Description: Swing your weapon twice in wide arcs, cutting down all enemies in front of you.

AxeMastery.Description: Enhances attack power of axes and swords. Improves critical damage.

AxeThrow.Description: Hurl your axe in a brutal arc, striking the target twice before it snaps back into your grasp.

AxeVortex.Description: Unleashes a powerful spinning slash that damages enemies in a wide area and pulls them toward the caster.

Barrier.Description: Envelops an ally in divine protection, forming a barrier equal to a portion of their maximum health. The aegis shields them completely from incoming physical attacks until it is broken.

Bash.Description: Delivers a crushing blow with a chance to stun the target.

Berserk.Description: Power without restraint. Enter a berserk state, greatly enhance combat power.

BladeDance.Description: Unleashes a flurry of strikes around you.

BladeMastery.Description: Enhances attack power of daggers and swords. Increases attack speed.

Blessing.Description: Imbues allies with divine protection, raising all attributes for a time.

Blink.Description: Instantly teleport to a target location, evading danger and repositioning with precision.

BloodCrash.Description: Release stored Rage, instantly healing yourself and regenerating health over time.

BloodFrenzy.Description: Violence without pause. Sacrifice control for speed and sustain.

BoneSpear.Description: You hurl a sharpened lance of bone, piercing through flesh and spirit alike.

BoneSpikes.Description: Jagged bone spires erupt violently from the ground, impaling enemies caught above them.

ChainLightning.Description: Unleashes a bolt of lightning that arcs between enemies, chaining to additional targets.

Cloaking.Description: Wraps the body in shifting shadows, blending seamlessly with the surroundings. While cloaked, movement is hidden from sight until the veil is broken by attack or skill use.

CodexMastery.Description: Boosts magical attack when wielding a book. Increases healing power.

Conjurer.Description: A deeper bond with summoned entities and restorative magic.

Consecration.Description: Sanctify the ground in divine light, healing allies and burning foes who stand within its glow.

Conviction.Description: Inspire allies with unwavering resolve, increasing their physical and magical strength.

CorpseBarrier.Description: You bind stolen bone and life into a grim protective barrier that absorbs incoming damage.

CorpseExplosion.Description: You violently explode a skeleton summon, scattering necrotic force outward in a lethal detonation. Causes nearby enemies and summons automatically explode on death.

Counter.Description: Take a defensive stance and retaliate with a counter slash when struck.

CritMastery.Description: A life of combat has perfected your edge, each critical strike hits with ruthless efficiency.

Cure.Description: Channels purifying energy to dispel harmful afflictions, restoring clarity where corruption once lingered.

CureAll.Description: Purifies allies in the area, removing poison, blindness, curse, and silence with a touch of holy grace.

Cyclone.Description: Spin violently while advancing, pulling enemies inward and shredding them with relentless strikes.

Damnation.Description: Calls down divine judgment upon the wicked, stripping away their defenses and leaving them vulnerable.

Dark Exorcism.Description: Unleashes profane rites twisted into shadow magic, tearing through enemies in an area with corrupted force. A blasphemous inversion of sacred exorcism.

DarkClaw.Description: Rip into the target with savage slashes, inflicting bleeding and fueling your rage.

DeathBond.Description: Healing and life-stealing effects are shared between bonded allies.

DeathBramble.Description: An oppressive undead field empowers necrotic attacks and erodes resistance within its reach.

DeathCoil.Description: You unleash a coiling strand of undead energy, damaging enemies and healing your summons.

DeathNova.Description: You release a burst of decaying energy that erupts outward, rotting enemies caught in the blast.

DeathSpiral.Description: You spin into a violent scythe assault, tearing through everything nearby as necrotic force surges outward.

Defiance.Description: Radiate unyielding faith that lessens the force of ranged and magical attacks for allies nearby.

Dispell.Description: Removes all buffs and harmful statuses from the target, returning them to a neutral state.

DivinePunishment.Description: Call down a rain of radiant swords from above, piercing the unworthy with sustained holy fury.

Divinity.Description: Enters a transcendent state of grace, amplifying the priest’s healing and protective power for a short duration.

DualWieldMastery.Description: Unlocks the ability to wield a weapon in each hand.

EarthBarrier.Description: Assume the Avatar of Stone, anchoring yourself with unyielding earth. Permanently attunes you to Earth, increasing resistances and block.

EarthSpikes.Description: The ground erupts in a sudden burst of jagged stone, impaling enemies from below.

EarthWall.Description: Raises a wall of solid stone from the ground, obstructing foes and shaping the battlefield.

Earthbolt.Description: Harnesses the pulse of the earth to strike a single foe with crushing, earthen might.

Earthquake.Description: Shakes the ground with devastating tremors, toppling and stunning all enemies caught in the upheaval.

EnchantArmorHoly.Description: Bless your armor with divine light, transforming your element to Holy.

EndowHoly.Description: Blesses a weapon with holy light, converting its attacks to Holy element.

EnergyShield.Description: A shimmering barrier hums with arcane force, absorbing harm until its energy fades. Redirects a portion of incoming damage to MP instead of HP.

Execute.Description: Deliver a devastating finishing blow, dealing massive damage.

Exorcism.Description: Calls down sacred radiance upon an area, banishing cursed beings and striking foes with holy wrath.

ExplosiveGrenade.Description: Hurls an explosive charge that detonates after a short delay, burning enemies in the area.

Faith.Description: Strengthens divine conviction, increasing damage against Undead and Shadow foes while reducing harm taken from them.

FanFire.Description: Rapidly unloads a flurry of shots at a single target.

FanOfKnives.Description: Scatter a fan of blades in a sweeping arc, leaping through the target’s space to evade retaliation while opening enemies to follow-up techniques.

Fanaticism.Description: Fills the priest with unshakable zeal, each strike grows swifter and more relentless, guided by divine wrath.

FieldCurse.Description: Radiant spirits descend in silent judgment, severing the soul from grace. The afflicted find their healing turned against them, their essence exposed to the full weight of Magic assault.

FieldDamage.Description: A field of spiritual interference thrums with jagged tension, stalling thought, movement, and will. Those within find their bodies sluggish, their instincts dulled, as if time itself resists them.

FieldHealing.Description: A tranquil hum radiates outward, harmonizing body and spirit. Beneath its gentle shimmer, vitality stirs and clarity takes root.

FieldSilence.Description: A ghostly presence descends in silence. Within its reach, the air thickens and thought falters, all sound swallowed by stillness.

FireBarrier.Description: Assume the Avatar of Fire, embodying living flame. Permanently attunes you to Fire, igniting enemies that strike you and increasing all healing received.

FirePillar.Description: Summons a pillar of flame that erupts from the ground, searing enemies caught within its blaze.

FireRelease.Description: Summons a blazing whale of flame that leaps skyward before crashing down, engulfing enemies in fire.

Fireball.Description: Casts a fiery orb that explodes on impact, dealing fire damage in an area. Leaves behind a Firewall at the impact zone.

Firebolt.Description: Launches a concentrated flame that scorches a single enemy with fire-element Magic damage.

Firewall.Description: Creates a lingering wall of flame that keeps enemies at bay.

FlameOrb.Description: Launch a slow-moving core of condensed energy that threatens the battlefield before rupturing outward on impact, releasing a controlled burst that scorches everything within range.

FlashBang.Description: Backslide out of danger and prepare a flash grenade, setting up your next move.

FlowState.Description: Adopt a disciplined combat rhythm, weaving techniques between strikes. Autoattacks draw on magical power and trigger techniques more frequently, favoring sustained pressure over raw burst.

ForceShot.Description: A powerful shot that knocks the target back on impact.

FreeCast.Description: Allows the caster to move and attack while casting, at the cost of reduced movement and attack speed.

FreezeGrenade.Description: Throws a freezing charge that immobilizes enemies caught in the blast.

FreezingField.Description: Unleashes a flurry of jagged ice, freezing and battering enemies in its wake.

FrostBlade.Description: A spinning technique that drags enemies inward as pressure collapses toward a single point. At the moment of convergence, energy is stripped to zero, freezing all caught at the core.

FuryBond.Description: You share a volatile surge of energy with your bonded ally. The world around you blurs with speed, but at the cost of lowered defenses.

Grace.Description: Invokes a holy blessing that increases natural health and mana recovery rate.

GrandCross.Description: Unleash a radiant cross of holy light that expands outward, purging the battlefield in waves of divine power.

GraveChill.Description: A chilling necrotic presence hastens allies while sapping the speed of nearby enemies.

GroundSlam.Description: Slam the ground with immense force, staggering enemies and slowing them in the shockwave.

GuardianBond.Description: You and your bonded summon surge with shared aggression.

GunMastery.Description: Increases attack power with all firearms and slightly improves attack speed. Allows dual wielding pistols.

Harvest.Description: You leap forward in a wide scythe swing, carving through enemies and priming them for a devastating follow-up.

Haste.Description: A surge of energy rushes through the limbs, quickening reflexes and footwork.

HasteAll.Description: Blesses nearby allies with heightened swiftness, increasing movement and attack speed for a short duration.

Heal.Description: Channels holy energy to restore health to a target ally.

HealAll.Description: Unleashes a wave of radiant energy, restoring health to all allies within range.

HighGuard.Description: Enter a steadfast stance, raising your shield high to protect nearby allies from incoming harm.

HighHeal.Description: Channels an intense surge of divine power to fully restore an ally’s vitality, at great mana cost.

HolyLight.Description: Releases a focused ray of divine energy, dealing holy damage to a single enemy.

HolyShield.Description: Bless your shield with divine protection, hardening your defenses against both steel and sorcery.

HolyWrath.Description: Unleashes concentrated holy power upon an enemy, dealing heavy damage and inflicting silence and holy vulnerability.

HydroVortex.Description: Unleashes a violent spiral of water, dragging enemies into its raging current.

IceRelease.Description: Calls forth a spectral pufferfish that spits shards of ice, piercing foes and leaving them slowed.

IceShard.Description: Fires a fast-moving ice projectile that shatters on impact, damaging and potentially freezing enemies.

Icebolt.Description: Hurls a shard of ice to deal water-element Magic damage to a single enemy.

IncreasedHealthRegen.Description: Improves natural health recovery over time.

Invoker.Description: Your mastery of spellcasting and summoning sharpens the mind. Empowers your summons to echo Soul Strike, allowing their magic to resonate with your own.

JudgementBlade.Description: Summon a radiant blade that cleaves through foes, dealing holy damage and leaving them slowed and exposed to further strikes.

JumpShot.Description: Leap into combat and fire mid-air, staggering enemies on impact and opening them up for follow-up attacks.

LifeBond.Description: Link your life to an ally’s, taking their wounds upon yourself.

LifeDrain.Description: You siphon vitality from enemies to sustain yourself. When bound to a summon, its aggression surges at the cost of its own life.

LightningReflexes.Description: Movement becomes instinct, action becomes lightning.

LightningRelease.Description: Unleashes a phoenix of lightning that streaks straight ahead, striking through all in its path.

LightningStrike.Description: Instantly cross space and strike the target’s position, committing fully to the engagement and collapsing the distance in a single motion.

LimitBreak.Description: Power surges beyond safe limits, but all defense is abandoned in the process.

Lockdown.Description: Brace your weapon and lock your position, unleashing sustained fire with heavy weapons.

MaceMastery.Description: Enhances attack power when using maces. Increases attack speed.

Marked.Description: Focus your aim on a single enemy, exposing their weak points. The target becomes Marked, reducing its ability to evade and resist critical strikes.

Meteor.Description: Calls down a burning mass from the heavens that explodes on impact, reducing the battlefield to ash.

MimicSeal.Description: Copies the essence of a target's magic, allowing you to cast their spell as your own.

MountMastery.Description: Through divine bond and discipline, the Paladin earns the right to ride a holy gryphon. Together, they soar as beacon and blade of the heavens. +25% movement speed while mounted.

Multistrike.Description: Grant multistrike to your basic attacks.

NinjutsuMastery.Description: Refined control of hidden arts enhances magical output and mana flow, extending the reach and endurance of advanced techniques.

PanicBurst.Description: Unleashes a sudden burst of gunfire, damaging enemies in an area and finishing prepared combos.

PiercingShot.Description: Fires a high-velocity round that pierces through enemies, staggering and knocking them back.

Pneuma.Description: Conjures a sacred barrier upon the ground, shielding allies within from physical attacks. The guardian spirit lingers briefly before fading.

PointBlankShot.Description: Fires a brutal close-range blast, blinding enemies and finishing shotgun combos.

PoisonGrenade.Description: Releases a toxic payload that poisons enemies over time.

PreciseAim.Description: Increases attack range and hit rate, enhancing precision with ranged weapons.

Reanimation.Description: You bind the lingering spirit of a fallen boss to your will, claiming it as an undead champion.

Reap.Description: You deliver a merciless finishing strike, siphoning life from enemies.

ResistanceMastery.Description: Countless battles have hardened your body and spirit. Reduces damage from all elements.

Revive.Description: Revives a fallen ally with a portion of their health and spirit restored. Requires strong faith and a long invocation.

ReviveAll.Description: Calls forth celestial light to return all fallen allies to life, restoring a small portion of their strength and spirit.

Sacrament.Description: Focuses the priest’s will into perfect spiritual clarity, empowering holy spells and cast proficiency.

SacredGround.Description: Hallow the earth itself, purging corruption and shielding those who stand within the sanctified circle.

Sacrifice.Description: Offer a portion of your own vitality to channel divine power, converting pain into radiant strength.

Sanctuary.Description: Raises a sacred tree that blesses the ground around it. Allies within its light steadily recover health, while undead that enter the sanctuary are repelled and harmed by its radiance.

ScytheMastery.Description: Increases weapon damage when wielding scythes, axes, or swords, and enables life siphoning through melee combat.

ShadowFeint.Description: Granting a brief moment of perfect evasion against all attacks, leaving behind a shadowy double as you slide backward out of danger.

ShadowMastery.Description: Mastery of shadow sharpens instinct and movement, allowing the Shinobi to slip past attacks with speed and uncanny evasions.

ShadowRelease.Description: Launches a whirling blade of darkness that carves toward a target, cutting through with shadow force.

ShadowSeal.Description: Forms a seal of shadows that splits your presence, summoning multiple clones to fight alongside you.

ShadowStep.Description: Teleports behind a target and strikes.

ShieldBash.Description: Charge forward with your shield, sending out a shockwave that staggers and stuns nearby enemies.

ShieldMastery.Description: Improves block rate and defences when equipping a shield.

ShieldThrow.Description: Hurl your shield forward, striking multiple enemies as divine light arcs between them before returning to your hand.

ShockAbsorber.Description: Reinforce yourself for close combat, reducing incoming impact while wielding shotguns.

ShoutBlood.Description: Unleash a savage howl, feeding allies with bloodlust.

ShoutFury.Description: Channel your fury into a battle cry, empowering allies.

ShoutMight.Description: Let out a powerful roar to bolster nearby allies.

ShoutStun.Description: Terrify nearby enemies with a deafening shout, staggering and stunning them while enraging yourself.

ShrapnelShot.Description: Blasts enemies with shrapnel at close range, slowing and bleeding those struck.

ShurikenFan.Description: Hurls a massive enchanted shuriken that spins in place, striking nearby enemies in rapid succession before fading.

SilentEdge.Description: Enter a lethal stance focused on precision and timing. Critical strikes land harder and more often, rewarding decisive movement and clean execution.

SkeletonMastery.Description: Enhances undead summons, increasing their damage output and resilience.

SlowTrap.Description: Unleashes a seeping pool of violet energy that spreads across the ground. Enemies who enter its grasp find their movements dragged and dulled, as though wading through shadowed mire.

Smite.Description: Strikes the target with a blessed blow, dealing holy physical damage and a chance to stun enemies with divine force.

SniperNest.Description: Take a steady stance and ready your weapon. While Sniper's Nest is active, your attack speed, and power rise, but your movement is hindered.

SniperShot.Description: Channels a devastating precision shot, dealing massive damage to a single target.

SoulDrain.Description: A draining aura siphons life from nearby foes, sustaining those who fight within it.

SoulStrike.Description: You form a protective pact with your summon.

SpearMastery.Description: Enhances attack power of spears and maces. Increases maximum health.

SpearQuicken.Description: Increases offensive power when wielding a sword or spear.

SpearSlice.Description: Sweep your weapon in a swift arc, staggering enemies around you.

SpearStab.Description: Deliver a precise, piercing blow. Deals bonus damage when used at the end of a combo.

SpearThrust.Description: Lunge forward with rapid jabs, striking multiple enemies in a line.

SpellShield.Description: Creates a sacred barrier that absorbs Magic damage, shielding an ally from hostile spells.

StatusRecovery.Description: Channels divine clarity to free an ally from paralysis or frozen bindings, restoring movement and control.

SteadyHands.Description: Improves control and precision, enhancing dexterity-based actions.

Stomp.Description: Slams the ground, stunning enemies in a wide area.

StrafingVolley.Description: Fires a rapid sequence of arrows at a single target.

SummonAbomination.Description: Summons a stitched mass of decaying flesh that controls space through sheer size and presence.

SummonAngel.Description: A radiant healer who channels light into soothing magic and soul-searing strikes.

SummonAttack.Description: Commands all active summons to converge on the chosen enemy or location, forcing them to attack your target.

SummonCactus.Description: A spiny sentinel that soaks up hits and punishes attackers without flinching.

SummonCat.Description: A nimble caster that darts between foes, blasting lightning with wild flair.

SummonMastery.Description: Improves the effectiveness of summoned allies, allowing them to inherit more of your power.

SummonMount.Description: Mount your active summon, taking direct control while remaining able to cast your own abilities and sharing all damage taken. Summon must be at it's final stage.

SummonReanimation.Description: You call forth a previously claimed undead champion, returning it to the battlefield.

SummonRecall.Description: Calls all active summons back to your side, cancelling their current actions and returning them instantly.

SummonSkeleton.Description: Raises a Skeleton Soldier to fight at your side, forming the backbone of your undead army.

SummonSkeletonMage.Description: Raises a Skeleton Mage that attacks from range with unstable necromantic magic.

SummonSwap.Description: Instantly swaps your active summon configuration, allowing rapid adaptation in combat.

SummonWolf.Description: A fast, feral brawler that tears into enemies with raw strength and speed.

SummonWraith.Description: Summons an elite undead arcanist that amplifies necromantic power and commands lesser undead.

SuppressiveShot.Description: Pins enemies down with suppressive fire, weakening those caught in the blast.

Taunt.Description: Forces affected targets to focus all basic attacks on you.

Tempest.Description: A furious gale tears across the battlefield, scattering and striking all caught in its path.

TetraVortex.Description: Unleashes an overwhelming surge of elemental power, erupting from the ground in a catastrophic blast. Deals massive Magic damage in a vast area and leaves enemies exposed to arcane force. The effect of Elemental Overload is determined by your current elemental attunement.

TetraVortexFire.Description: Elemental Overload ignites the battlefield, dealing repeated Fire damage and burning all enemies caught within the blast.

ThunderStorm.Description: Calls down a storm of lightning over a target area, striking all enemies within.

Thunderbolt.Description: Calls down a high-voltage bolt that strikes a single enemy, dealing wind-element Magic damage.

TriggerHappy.Description: Enter a heightened firing state, automatically attacking nearby enemies while in motion.

TurnUndead.Description: Attempts to purge undead and shadow-aligned enemies through divine judgment. Chance to deal 777% damage to Undead and Shadow. Chance = 2% per Lv + INT/5 + LUK/5 + MonsterMissingHealth% * 20

TwistOfFate.Description: Strike with overwhelming force, stunning and scattering enemies before slipping back into the shadows, readying the next decisive move.

TwohandParry.Description: Allows two-handed weapons to block attacks.

TwohandQuicken.Description: Increases offensive power when wielding a sword or axe.

Unyielding.Description: Consume Rage to steel your body, resisting incoming damage through sheer will.

VenomCoating.Description: A venomous sheen coats the blade, each strike delivering a silent death.

VenomStrike.Description: Strikes a target with a chance to inflict poison

Vitality.Description: Emit a gentle divine presence that strengthens the body, increasing vitality and restoring health over time.

VolatileBolt.Description: An arrow that explodes on impact, dealing area damage around the target.

WandMastery.Description: Boosts magical attack when wielding a wand. Increases casting speed.

WaterBarrier.Description: Assume the Avatar of Frost, cloaking yourself in bitter cold. Permanently attunes you to Water, freezing attackers and greatly increasing mana regeneration.

WeaponSwap.Description: Allows swapping between equipped gun sets.

WeaponThrow.Description: Hurl your weapon forward in a spinning path, damaging enemies as it returns.

WeaverMastery.Description: A quiet art that intertwines might, mind, and spirit.

Whirlwind.Description: Spin in place, slashing all enemies around you over time.

WildCharge.Description: Leap forward with ferocious momentum, crushing enemies on impact and leaving them bleeding.

WindBarrier.Description: Assume the Avatar of Storm, wreathed in surging wind and lightning. Permanently attunes you to Wind, discharging lightning when struck and increasing movement speed.

Zeal.Description: Inspires an ally with fervent conviction, boosting all damage for a duration.
